creator: boian.petrov@gmail.com
text:
While running portupgrade -arR it stops with this output:

root@VPC-BSD:/root # portupgrade -arR
Stale dependency: ImageMagick-6.7.3.4 --> perl-5.12.4_4 -- manually run 'pkgdb -F' to fix, or specify -O to force.

trying to fix it with pkgdb -F and -FO:

root@VPC-BSD:/root # pkgdb -F
--->  Checking the package registry database
Stale origin: 'audio/libmusicbrainz': perhaps moved or obsoleted.
-> The port 'audio/libmusicbrainz' was removed on 2012-09-18 because:
        "Has expired: MusicBrainz RDF webservice no longer functions"
-> Hint:  libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 is required by the following package(s):
        kdemultimedia-4.7.3
        kde-4.7.3
        libtunepimp-0.5.3_9,1
-> Hint: checking for overwritten files...
 -> No files installed by libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 have been overwritten by other packages.
Deinstall libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 ? [no] yes
--->  Deinstalling 'libmusicbrainz-2.1.5'
pkg_delete: package 'libmusicbrainz-2.1.5' is required by these other packages
and may not be deinstalled:
kde-4.7.3
kdemultimedia-4.7.3
libtunepimp-0.5.3_9,1
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! libmusicbrainz-2.1.5  (pkg_delete failed)
Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/local/sbin/pkg_deinstall libmusicbrainz-2.1.5


root@VPC-BSD:/root # pkgdb -FO
--->  Checking the package registry database
Stale origin: 'audio/libmusicbrainz': perhaps moved or obsoleted.
-> The port 'audio/libmusicbrainz' was removed on 2012-09-18 because:
        "Has expired: MusicBrainz RDF webservice no longer functions"
-> Hint:  libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 is required by the following package(s):
        kdemultimedia-4.7.3
        kde-4.7.3
        libtunepimp-0.5.3_9,1
-> Hint: checking for overwritten files...
 -> No files installed by libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 have been overwritten by other packages.
Deinstall libmusicbrainz-2.1.5 ? [no] yes
--->  Deinstalling 'libmusicbrainz-2.1.5'
pkg_delete: package 'libmusicbrainz-2.1.5' is required by these other packages
and may not be deinstalled:
kde-4.7.3
kdemultimedia-4.7.3
libtunepimp-0.5.3_9,1
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! libmusicbrainz-2.1.5  (pkg_delete failed)
Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/local/sbin/pkg_deinstall libmusicbrainz-2.1.5


I have perl 5.14.2 installed and no idea this "libmuzicbrainz" package comes from. I have kde 3.5 if it does matter.
Thanks in advice!
